title: Random Creatures ⭐
description:
Random Creatures in MC
This is a creature mod, we added more monster mobs. 

Similar to Mo' Creatures
body:
# About

Random Creatures Mobs

This mod adds more mobs similar to Mo' Creatures including the other.

Have you ever wanted to be hunted by creatures and monsters at night in Minecraft?

Have you wanted to pet them and be more friendly creatures some are enemies.

# Featured Creatures & Mobs

- Thraxan
- Sprouts
- Moss Spider
- Rose Living
- Flower Living
- Monster Plant walking
- Apple Living
- Type of dinosaurs
- Type of friendly creatures
- Robots
- Clownfish evolved can breathe in land and water
- Rognarr in 1.12.2 only
- Endersprouts
- Police Sprouts in 1.12.2 only used for CUSTOM NPC
- Police Car in 1.12.2 only used for CUSTOM NPC
- Helicopter in 1.12.2 only used for CUSTOM NPC
- Sprouts with green names in 1.12.2 are only used for CUSTOM NPC
- Sprouts Village with Backpack in 1.12.2 only

## Added Rose Creature Girls
- Some are friendly beings some are enemies beings
- They are friendly and enemies some will attack them you can pet them
![Sprout Flowers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f59a1f0e922e1e7fe7691e461f00d39cc3982f60_0.webp)

## Sprouts intelligent beings
- They have humanoid body and are also intelligent beings they can attack monsters and when you give apples to sprouts they will reproduce new sprouts and become your pets
- The Sprouts love apples
- The Red Sprouts don't like TNT they can destroy TNT block and disappear it

![Sprouts humanoid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db2252246a71cfc08c8d78f60672dd23166e4422_0.webp)

## Both genders in Sprouts
- Both girl and boy gender existed in Sprouts Mobs
- Just random colors of sprouts

![Sprout both genders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c585f075aaf82dc8ffe17c33d3ecfc7bc8c5969c_0.webp)

## Added Thraxan Mob
- They are giant humanlike insects that have blue skinned
- They are friendly and nice creatures
![Thraxan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f86491d8afa4d0400c66f26283e87c2db170fd20_0.webp)

## Added Sprouts +
- There are multiple sprouts and added Zombie Sprouts.

- Therefore the Sprouts should in be the 1.20.1 version

- This is Sprouts from Noobanidus original Sprouts mobs
![Sprout Random](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0edda7bf92a5eff5742385bc87372f5667d77c48_0.webp)

## Added Moss Spiders
- Moss Spiders are type of rock spider living

- The enemy Moss Spider has red eyes

- The good Moss Spider has blue eyes
  
- Skeleton will sit on Moss Spider when they random spawn in night

- Red eyes = Enemy
- Blue eyes = Friendly
![Moss Spiders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05cb9647f3e9f80cec9dd798b7d3e6f649079576_0.webp)

## Added Monster Plants
- They are too strong and have more health than other
- They can eat any living
![Monster Plant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e1cd6c798d86d35838a89fb9bc6b3f4b42ac4b0_0.webp)

## Added Living Flowers Walking
- The flowers and walked random
![Living Flower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a9a094500d9902f2e659e233f844392e339dae5_0.webp)

## Added Living Robots
- They have glowing eyes and friendly
![Robot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c8e7594c20f4f045cda626db16002e40fd2c372.png)

## Items - Foods
- When you hunt those creatures you can eat or get their items.
![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b63710781ee355574915308335d0a55b7a89e37_0.webp)

## CustomNPC and Added more Skins in MC 1.20.1 +
- When you download CustomNPC and you can select mobs with more skins you want.

> Credit: Noobanidus "Sprouts" for his amazing mobs

> Added Skeleton allowed to sit Moss Spider if you find them.

> Living Apples pictures will be coming soon.

> Similar to Mo' Creatures mobs.

- I will be adding more creatures soon...
Hope you enjoy this...

( https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-sprouts-mcreator )
